import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/components/TrainingDataUploadModal.tsx");import { Fragment, jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/TrainingDataUploadModal.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { X, AlertCircle, CheckCircle, FileText } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
export function TrainingDataUploadModal({ isOpen, onClose, onUpload }) {
  _s();
  const [name, setName] = useState("");
  const [type, setType] = useState("legislation");
  const [source, setSource] = useState("");
  const [tags, setTags] = useState([]);
  const [tagInput, setTagInput] = useState("");
  const [file, setFile] = useState(null);
  const [uploading, setUploading] = useState(false);
  if (!isOpen) return null;
  const handleSubmit = () => {
    if (!name || !source || !file) {
      alert("Please fill in all required fields");
      return;
    }
    setUploading(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      onUpload({ name, type, source, file, tags });
      setUploading(false);
      setName("");
      setType("legislation");
      setSource("");
      setTags([]);
      setFile(null);
      onClose();
    }, 1500);
  };
  const addTag = () => {
    if (tagInput.trim() && !tags.includes(tagInput.trim())) {
      setTags([...tags, tagInput.trim()]);
      setTagInput("");
    }
  };
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "cmxd0", _fgB: 1779104383054, _fgD: true, className: "fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4", "data-fg-cmxd0": "418.168:418.8736:/src/app/components/TrainingDataUploadModal.tsx:53:5:1358:7335:e:div:e:1", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "cmxd1", _fgB: 1779104383054, className: "bg-[#0f2832] border border-[#1a3440] rounded-2xl w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto", "data-fg-cmxd1": "418.168:418.8736:/src/app/components/TrainingDataUploadModal.tsx:54:7:1467:7215:e:div:etete", children: [

_c = TrainingDataUploadModal;
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "TrainingDataUploadModal");
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/TrainingDataUploadModal.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/TrainingDataUploadModal.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
